response:
TEMPERATURE IS A MEASURE OF HEAT.
SOME STATES SHOW STRONG STORMS.
SUNSHINE SENDS SOFT SHADOWS.
SILVER SKIES SPREAD SOFTLY.
STARS SHINE SOFTLY IN SPACE.
STORMS SWEEP SOUTHWARD SLOWLY.
SEAS SEND SOFT SOUNDS.
SNOW STICKS SOFTLY TO SOIL.
SAND SPILLS SOFTLY SOUTH.
SOULS SEEK SILENT SPACES.
SUNSETS SHOW SOFT SHADOWS.
WINDS ROLL SOUTHWARD SOFTLY.
